name: independent insurance brokers managing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For independent insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, inefficient management causes missed renewal deadlines. We provide a streamlined policy management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient management of policy renewals leading to missed deadlines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient management of policy renewals leading to missed deadlines.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For independent insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, inefficient management causes missed renewal deadlines. We provide a streamlined policy management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
